subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God that thou hast attained, through the ocean of divine bounty, unto the recognition of His Being and hast turned thy face toward the true Kaaba [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله از بحر فضل الهی بعرفان نفسش فائز شدی و بکعبه حقیقی توجه نمودی بعد از این
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @knowledge; recognition of God
